pre_game.message: Hey B, I'm G — nice to meet you; what brings you to this game and do you have a strategy in mind? I'm hoping to make a good run for the prize and would love to hear your thoughts.

Hey G — I'm here to win money for me and the people I care about; my plan is to be friendly and learn everyone's intentions, build a couple of tentative alliances early, but stay cautious and be ready to look out for myself when it counts.
Same — I'm here to win for my people too. I like your approach; let's tentatively team up to swap intel and watch each other's backs while staying flexible.
I'm in — glad to team up. Let's swap notes after talking to a few people; who should we approach first?
Sounds good — let's start with the quieter players who might be persuadable; talk to C first, then D, and after that we can approach the more outspoken ones to size up threats.
Good plan — I'll talk to C then D; let's meet back in 15 minutes to compare notes and decide next moves.
Perfect — I'll talk to E and F, gather intel, and meet you in 15 to compare notes.
Great — good luck with E and F; I'll talk to C and D now and see you in 15 to compare notes.
Thanks — good luck with C and D; I'll get what I can from E and F and we'll compare notes in 15.
Thanks — good luck with E and F; I'll see you in 15 with what I learn.
Sounds good — see you in 15 to compare notes.
Sounds good — see you in 15; I'll have notes ready.
Thanks — see you in 15; let's compare notes and pick two people to approach together.
Sounds good — see you in 15; we'll compare notes and then pick two to approach together.
Sounds good — see you in 15 to compare notes; if our intel lines up, let’s approach D and F together.
I'm on board — that works for me; if our intel lines up, let's approach D and F together. See you in 15.
Sounds like a solid plan — see you in 15 with notes; if things check out we'll approach D and F together.
Sounds good — see you in 15; I’ll have notes ready and we can pivot if anything looks off.
Perfect — see you in 15; bring your notes and we'll pivot if anything looks off.
Sounds good — I’ll bring detailed notes and be ready to pivot if needed. See you in 15.
Great — see you in 15. Bring those notes and we’ll compare and pick our next moves.
